titleStmt.title: SII 29.107: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 107. (A.R. No. B. 797 of 1962-63.) JĪVAṆAGI, GULBARGA TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup into the prākāra of the Bimbanātha temple, in front of the central shrine.

It states that when Jagadēkamalladēva was ruling over the empire from the capital Kalyanapura, Kriyāśakti-paṇḍita, the ācharya of the sthāna of god Bibbēśvara of Jīvanige, along with the prabhus and the samastanagaras made some grants of land to the god Pārśvanātha of the village, attached to the Śāntinātha [basadi] of Alande. The grant was made at the instance of Bhānusēnayya.

The grant was made for raṅgabhōga and offerings to Pārśvanāthadēva and for feeding the ascetics living there. It included one garden of two matter extent. The record has a description of the ascetic qualities of Kriyāśakti-paṇḍita.
It is dated in the Jagadēkamalla year 2, Vibhava, Mārggaśira, ba. 14 Monday. It corresponds to 1148 A.D., December 11, Saturday (not Monday).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī matsarama gaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ jīyātraiḷōkya nātha
syaśāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . svasti samasta bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpri
thvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya kuḷaLetter jA engraved below the line.
tiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō
ttarābhivriddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbara kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷu
sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire śrīmaccāḷukya pra
tāpa cakravartti jagadēkamalla variṣa 11 neya vibhava saṁvatsarada
mārggaśira bahuḷa caturdaśi sōmavāradaṁdu . jagatī jaṁgamaraḷda bhū
jajagatisaujanya ratnākaraṁ jagatī mahāṁburāśi jagatīvādī
bha vajrāṁkuśaṁ jagatībandhura bōdharūpaṁ jagatī sāhitya vidyāvidaṁ
jagatī śaṁkaraneṁdu baṇṇipudiḷā cakraṁ kriyāśaktiyaṁ . ghanadī
rgghōdbhāsi mūḷaṁ jaḍekusmarajalla pūrṇṇagucchaṁ nijādhāra nijāṁgā
lagna valkalāṁciḷavaḷita latābhrāta kāntōpavītaṁ munimārggākāradiṁ
dirddudu vinuta niḷiṁpācaḷō pāntadoḷ vāgvanitākānta kaikṛyāśaktiya vitara
ṇabhītāḷu kalpāvanīja . svasti yamaniyama svādhyāya dhyānadhāra
ṇa māmaunānuṣṭhāna japasamādhisīḷa saṁpannaruṁ lākuḷāgamavanavasantaru
mappa śrīyajjīvanigeya bibbēsvaradēvara sthānadācāryya śrīmatkṛ
yāśakti paṇḍitadēvaru prabhugaḷaṁ samastanagara mukhyamāgi
bhānusēnyeyaṁgaḷau kāraṇamāgi Alaṁdeya śāntināthadēvara pratiba
ddhamappa jīvanigeya śrīpārśvanātha dēvaraṁgabhōga nivēdyakkama
llirdda riśiyarāhāra dānakkeṁdu būyārada baṭṭeyiṁ paḍuvalu go
ddedēvana bīḷoḷage hiriya kolomattaru keyaṁ kuruvakuṁṭeya
baṭṭeya baḍaga deseyaloṁdu tōṭaṁgaḷidalli kālaḍiyimmattaru tōṁ
ṭa haḷḷada mūḍadeseyoḷ māṟidalli hoṁgommān bhattamuṁ sa
ṭṭuga bāḷaminti nituma sarvvābādha parihāramāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi
koṭṭaru . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyōharētu vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhirvvarasa saha
srāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . Ivaniyaṁdadrineyde pāḷisuvava
rgge klē saṁbaddhi saṁbhavikuṁ koṁḍaḷidaṁge gaṁge gaya kēdāra kuru
kṣētrameṁbivaṟoḷ hēsade pārvvaraṁ goravaraṁ gōvṛṁdamaṁ peṁḍiraṁ tavekoṁdikki
dāpāpameydugumavaṁ bīḷguṁ nigōdaṁgaḷoḷ .
Digital edition of SII 29.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
